name: flux_dev_basic_generation_template
description: Template workflow for testing FLUX.1-dev in ComfyUI. It assumes extra_model_paths.yaml is installed and FLUX files are in models/flux/diffusion_models, models/flux/text_encoders, and models/flux/vae.
required_comfyui_nodes: DualCLIPLoader or CLIPLoader pair for clip_l and t5xxl
notes: This is a portable specification template, not a guaranteed queue-ready ComfyUI graph. Exact node class names vary by ComfyUI version.
In ComfyUI, select flux1-dev.safetensors from diffusion_models, clip_l.safetensors and t5xxl_fp16.safetensors from text_encoders, and ae.safetensors from vae.
default_prompt: portrait photo of a person, clean lighting, detailed face, high quality
